tasks.description: Initialize Spring Boot 3 project (Java 21, Maven). Add dependencies: Web, Data JPA, PostgreSQL Driver, Liquibase, Validation, Lombok. Configure checkstyle.

Create docker-compose.yml for PostgreSQL 16. Extract all sensitive credentials to an .env file. Add .env to .gitignore immediately. Configure application.yaml and docker-compose to use these environment variables.
acceptance_criteria: docker-compose.yml uses env_file or variable substitution
Container starts and App connects to DB successfully

tasks.description: Setup Liquibase. Create db.changelog-master.yaml. Create plain SQL migration 'changes/001-initial-schema.sql' for 'users', 'categories', and 'tasks' tables using the provided strict schema context. Include explicit foreign keys and constraints. Write --rollback scripts for each table.
acceptance_criteria: Liquibase runs on Spring Boot startup without errors
Foreign keys user_id and category_id in 'tasks' strictly reference parent tables
Rollback statements are present and valid

tasks.description: Implement User entity, Repository, Service, and Controller (CRUD). No auth needed yet.
Implement Category entity (e.g., Home, Work). Pre-fill default categories via Liquibase data migration.
Implement Task entity linked to User and Category. Add filtering by Category in GET /tasks.
Create Postman Collection JSON with scenarios: Create User -> Create Category -> Create Task -> Get Tasks (Filtered) -> Delete Task.
